content.text:
{
  "component": "documentating",
  "summary": "Antora-powered docs site with custom domain and automated gh-pages publishing; strong operational scaffolding but missing content QA gates, previews, and rollback clarity.",
  "strengths": [
    "Deterministic Antora build and gh-pages publish via GitHub Actions",
    "Custom domain (CNAME) and nojekyll handling for public site",
    "Search enabled through Antora lunr extension",
    "Scheduled Quality Atlas assessment workflow with concurrency control"
  ],
  "risks": [
    "No pre-publish link/structure validation in CI",
    "No PR preview or staged environment before publishing",
    "No explicit rollback strategy for gh-pages",
    "Cloudflare deploy artifacts exist but are not wired into CI"
  ],
  "next_actions": [
    "Add link and structure validation steps before the publish stage in gh-pages workflow",
    "Add a post-publish synthetic probe to verify availability",
    "Enable PR previews or ephemeral deployments for docs review",
    "Document and automate a rollback path for gh-pages (keep last-known-good ref)",
    "If Cloudflare is intended, integrate a CI step to configure/apply edge settings",
    "Cache npm/pip dependencies in CI to speed up and stabilize builds"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Assessment grounded in repository facts and existing snapshot; no runtime telemetry present in-repo.",
    "Workflows use Node 24 and Python 3.12; Antora 3.1.12 with lunr extension is configured.",
    "Operational directories (.gate, .deploy, .smoke, .intelligence, .commanding) are present but not fully documented."
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "evidence_paths": [
    ".github/workflows/gh-pages.yml",
    ".github/workflows/quality-atlas-assessment.yml",
    "package.json",
    "antora-playbook.yml",
    "docs/CNAME",
    ".antora-src/antora.yml",
    ".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/index.adoc",
    ".gate/README.md",
    ".smoke/probe",
    ".deploy/cloudflare"
  ],
  "suggested_score_overrides": {
    "product": null,
    "architecture": null,
    "runtime": null,
    "qa": null,
    "ops": null,
    "market": null,
    "overall": null
  },
  "metric_updates": {
    "product": {
      "summary": "Antora-driven static documentation site with a custom domain and deterministic GH Actions build/publish pipeline, providing a clear owner-facing identity.",
      "risks": [
        "Audience and scope are not explicitly stated on the landing page or README.",
        "Content quality gates (e.g., link/structure checks) are not enforced before publish."
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "State the target audience and scope on the landing page/README.",
        "Add pre-publish link and structure validation in the gh-pages workflow.",
        "Publish a simple docs changelog to communicate notable updates."
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "package.json",
        "antora-playbook.yml",
        "docs/CNAME",
        ".antora-src/antora.yml",
        ".github/workflows/gh-pages.yml",
        ".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/index.adoc"
      ]
    },
    "architecture": {
      "summary": "Clear operational folder boundaries (.gate, .deploy, .smoke, .intelligence, .commanding) and Antora source are present, but responsibilities/ownership and workflow coupling are not documented.",
      "risks": [
        "Domain/bounded-context boundaries for repo tooling are not described.",
        "Coupling between scripts/workflows is not documented, which may hinder maintenance."
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Add an architecture/ownership section mapping directories to responsibilities (README or BUILDING.md).",
        "Document how Antora source, CI workflows, and publication artifacts relate end-to-end."
      ],
      "evidence": [
        ".gate/MANIFEST.json",
        ".deploy/MANIFEST.md",
        ".smoke/probe",
        ".intelligence/intelligence.json",
        ".commanding/README.md",
        "BUILDING.md",
        ".antora-src/antora.yml"
      ]
    },
    "runtime": {
      "summary": "Static site is served via GitHub Pages; scalability is handled by the platform, with no explicit runtime probes or edge controls wired into the CI.",
      "risks": [
        "No runtime health checks or synthetic probes are integrated into the publish workflow.",
        "Cloudflare configuration artifacts exist but are not integrated with CI, risking config drift."
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Document the hosting/edge strategy and expected caching behavior.",
        "Add a post-publish synthetic probe step to verify site availability.",
        "If Cloudflare is intended, add an automated deployment/configuration step."
      ],
      "evidence": [
        ".github/workflows/gh-pages.yml",
        ".deploy/cloudflare",
        "docs/CNAME"
      ]
    },
    "qa": {
      "summary": "Quality scaffolding exists (.gate, .smoke), but the gh-pages workflow lacks automated link/structure validation and does not run probes before publishing.",
      "risks": [
        "Broken links or content regressions could ship without detection.",
        "No contract/e2e checks exist for the published site artifacts."
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Add link and content validation steps to the gh-pages workflow prior to publish.",
        "Wire simple .smoke probes to run on each build.",
        "Introduce a basic PR check that builds the site and surfaces issues early."
      ],
      "evidence": [
        ".gate/quality",
        ".smoke/probe",
        ".github/workflows/gh-pages.yml"
      ]
    },
    "ops": {
      "summary": "CI automates Antora build and gh-pages publish with concurrency control; a scheduled assessment job maintains Quality Atlas snapshots.",
      "risks": [
        "Single production deploy on push without previews or staged environments.",
        "No explicit rollback mechanism is defined for gh-pages publishes.",
        "No dependency caching is configured, leading to slower, less deterministic builds."
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Add PR previews or ephemeral deployments for review.",
        "Keep a last-known-good gh-pages reference and document rollback steps.",
        "Cache npm and pip dependencies in CI to stabilize and speed up builds."
      ],
      "evidence": [
        ".github/workflows/gh-pages.yml",
        ".github/workflows/quality-atlas-assessment.yml"
      ]
    },
    "market": {
      "summary": "As a documentation component, market alignment is secondary; discoverability and clarity are supported by Antora and the lunr extension.",
      "risks": [
        "Audience and value proposition are not clearly stated for external readers.",
        "No visible changelog/release notes to communicate documentation updates."
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Add a short 'Who this is for' section on the landing page/README.",
        "Publish a simple docs changelog or release notes section."
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "package.json",
        ".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/index.adoc",
        "README.md"
      ]
    },
    "overall": {
      "summary": "Solid automated documentation delivery with scheduled assessment support; main gaps are automated content QA, preview environments, and rollback readiness.",
      "risks": [
        "Potential to ship regressions due to lack of pre-publish checks.",
        "Operational assets remain unintegrated, creating drift between intent and execution."
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Introduce CI quality gates and previews before publishing.",
        "Connect smoke/probes post-build and document ownership/rollback paths."
      ],
      "evidence": [
        ".github/workflows/gh-pages.yml",
        ".github/workflows/quality-atlas-assessment.yml",
        ".deploy/cloudflare",
        ".gate/README.md",
        ".smoke/probe"
      ]
    }
  }
}
